title: No Fall Damage
description: Removes all fall damage from players. Simple, lightweight, and works in all game modes
body:
###  No Fall Damage Datapack
**Minecraft Version:** 1.21.5-1.21.9

**Description:**  
This datapack removes fall damage. You can jump from high places without getting hurt. It's great for parkour maps, skyblock, or just having fun in survival.

**Features:**
- No more fall damage.
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer.
- No setup needed — just install and play.

**How to Install (Modrinth App):**
1. Open the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. Create a new instance.
3. Search for No Fall Damage and add it to the instance.
5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy!

###  How to Install (Method 2 – Vanilla Datapack)
1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Open Minecraft and go to your world.
3. Click **"Edit"** on your world → then **"Open World Folder"**.
4. Open the `datapacks/` folder.
5. Drop the `.zip` file inside.
6. Launch the world and done!
### how this works
this datapack/mod uses the attribute command to set the fall multiplier to 0, which means it works for all versions that has /attribute command
